profile.name: Sabrina
profile.bio: Not just one thing. I analyze, I code, I dig into data, and sometimes all three at once. This is a collection of projects that came out of that chaos.

experience.title: Senior Web Developer
experience.description: Led development of multiple full-stack web applications using Django and React. Managed a team of 3 developers and improved application performance by 40%.

experience.title: Web Developer
experience.description: Developed responsive web applications with focus on user experience. Collaborated with design and product teams to deliver high-quality solutions.

experience.title: Junior Developer
experience.description: Built static websites and assisted in full-stack development. Learned best practices and modern development frameworks.

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: A full-featured online store with Django backend and React frontend.

projects.title: Design System
projects.description: Comprehensive UI component library with documentation and examples.

projects.title: Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Real-time data visualization dashboard with interactive charts.
